name: flywheel
description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code — ideate (fuzzy ideas → user-approved designs through open dialogue), define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable, red-teamed goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-at-a-time orchestrator on the current branch — next goal, an exact goal, or a --count/--unlimited sequential batch — with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate behind an independent second-view review), goals-status (read-only view of the open docs/goals queue), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor). Ships three tool-restricted read-only subagents for the factory's review roles: gate-reviewer, fresh-check, and contract-red-team.
